overview: A vehicle tracking app for motorcycles and cars. Dashboard shows summary metrics for vehicles, pending jobs, overdue maintenance, and total expenses. Includes recent jobs with status badges and an upcoming/overdue maintenance schedule.
features: Dashboard with 4 summary metric cards (Vehicles, Pending Jobs, Overdue Maintenance, Total Expenses)
Recent Jobs section showing last 3 jobs with status badges (Completado / En Progreso / Pendiente)
Maintenance Schedule section with upcoming and overdue items, due dates, and urgency badges (Próximo / Vencido)
Data persistence via backend canister state
Responsive layout optimized for quick at-a-glance information
